title: My Daughter-in-Law Stole My $60K Pension. So I Opened A Rival Dog Boarding.
description: After I drained my $60,000 pension to fund my daughter-in-law’s dog-boarding dream, she forged documents to cut me out of the $700,000-a-year business. I exposed the fraud, sued for the intellectual property, and opened a rival 'Breach of Trust Boarding' right across the street. Now 80% of her clients are mine. #RevengeStory #Betrayal #Karma
thumb_text: I POACHED 80% OF HER CLIENTS AFTER FORGERY
pinned_comment: If your daughter-in-law forged a contract to steal your $60,000 retirement investment, would you have sued like I did, or would you have handled it differently? Tell me your story in the comments.

thumb_lines.text: NOW I RUN A RIVAL BOARDING BUSINESS ACROSS THE STREET
